mapper.select: SELECT points FROM membership_t WHERE user_id = #{mId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history_t (m_id, type, amount, balance_after, order_id, description) VALUES (#{mId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{orderId}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT ph_idx AS phIdx, m_id AS mId, type, amount, balance_after AS balanceAfter, order_id AS orderId, description, reg_date AS regDate FROM point_history_t WHERE m_id = #{mId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC, ph_idx DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM point_history_t WHERE m_id = #{mId}
SELECT points_earned FROM order_t WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT points_used FROM order_t WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
